titleStmt.title: SII 9.350: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 350. (A.R. No. 209 of 1918.) ON THE SAME PILLAR. This inscription is written in continuation of No.

summary.p: This is dated Chitrabhānu, Bhādrapada, amāvāse, Sōmavāra in the reign of the Hoysaḷa king Vīra-Narasiṁha (III). The date is irregular. In Chitrabhānu = A.D. 1282, Bhādrapada amāvāsyā fell on Thursday, 6th September. A number of persons (named), along with Masaṇeya-Sāvanta, are said to have made a gift for the service of the same god as the one mentioned in No. 349 above and for feeding 12 Brāhmans.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrīmatu yādavanārāyaṇa pra
tāpacakravarti hoysaṇavīranārasiṁgadēvara varṣada citra
bhānusaṁvatsarada bhādrapada Amāvāse sōmavāradaṁdu
Arasumaneyalli sūrabōvana maga mayadabōva saudarebīrabōva he
ggaḍemaneya naṁnabōvana maga Ayabōva cigaṭēṟa caṁdabōva kuttaṁ
giya saṁgabōvana rāmabōva hoḷaguṁdeya guṁḍabōva kō
gaḷiya naṁdibōva sūriyasōmeyasāvantana maga mārayasā
vaṁtana ta(ṁ)mma masaṇeyasāvaṁtanuṁ Iṁtinibaruṁ mukhya
vāgi śrīmatu beṁṇevūrastaḷadalu mahānāḍāgi neredu Ā vūra
śrīsvayaṁbhuvirūpākṣadēvarigaṁ haṁnirbbaru mahājanaṁgaḷigaṁ ta
mma biluvaḍike mukhyavāgi kabbilavaḍike Āvudu baṁdaḍaṁ sarvvanama
syavāgi dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍikoṭṭu biṭṭa dharmma .
Digital edition of SII 9.350 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
